title: Urgent Opening Teacher at TechSaksham South Asia Partners

jsonLd.title: Urgent Opening Teacher at TechSaksham South Asia Partners
jsonLd.description:
Join the TechSaksham South Asia Partners family as a Teacher in Ahmedabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About TechSaksham South Asia Partners:
TechSaksham South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TechSaksham South Asia Partners!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
